pageContext.name: Sang-woo
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Tamashii nations are excited to present the Sang-woo Mini Figure!  Your favorite characters are stylized and squashed down to adorable palm-sized proportions with lifelike eyes and simple posability.  Sang-woo from the hit Netflix drama 'Squid Game' joins the Figuarts Mini series. Don't miss your chance to add this figure to your collection today!
